growth_news.title: A Teacher Wins Big in the Presidential AI Challenge!
growth_news.description: An awesome teacher from North Carolina was named a national champion in a big science competition! These teams are using AI to create fun and helpful tools that make school even better for students and teachers alike.

growth_news.title: AI is Set to Boost Your Favorite Neighborhood Shops
growth_news.description: Experts predict that new, easy-to-use AI tools will help local, family-owned businesses grow. From helping bakeries guess how many cookies to bake to letting small stores design cool websites, AI is becoming a super helper for everyday heroes.

growth_news.title: AI Helps Give Doctors More Time with Their Patients
growth_news.description: A new study shows that smart software is saving doctors and nurses lots of precious time by helping them write down notes much faster. This gives them more time to listen to and care for their patients, making visits to the clinic friendlier and more helpful.

tech_news.title: Tech Giants Join Forces to Build Super-Smart AI
tech_news.description: Apple, Google, and Nvidia are teaming up to build incredibly advanced technology together. Think of it like a superhero alliance where each company brings its unique superpower to make computers more helpful and creative than ever before.

tech_news.title: Siri is Getting a Major AI Brain Upgrade!
tech_news.description: Apple has revealed a brand new version of Siri powered by advanced AI. This upgrade will make Siri much better at understanding what you mean, remembering your conversations, and helping you search for things on your phone using simple, natural language.

tech_news.title: New 'Safe' Version of Mythos AI Released
tech_news.description: The creators at Anthropic have built a version of their advanced 'Mythos' technology with built-in safety features. It is designed to act like a smart, helpful buddy that avoids sharing incorrect information or playing tricks, making it safer for everyone to use.

jargons.definition: A computer system designed to mimic how the human brain learns and processes information.
jargons.example: Imagine a giant web of lightbulbs that turn on and off. When they work together in a certain pattern, they can instantly recognize a drawing of a cat!
jargons.use_case: Used to power face recognition on phones and recommend videos you might like.

jargons.definition: A smart trick that lets an AI look at all the words in a sentence at once to figure out which words are most important to each other.
jargons.example: In the sentence 'The bank of the river,' self-attention helps the AI know 'bank' means the edge of water, not a place with money, by looking at 'river'.
jargons.use_case: Helps translation apps convert entire paragraphs accurately without losing the original meaning.

jargons.definition: A technique that lets an AI search a trusted database of facts before answering a question.
jargons.example: It is like taking an open-book test. Instead of guessing from memory, the AI quickly flips to the right page in a textbook to give you the perfect answer.
jargons.use_case: Used by school help-bots to give accurate answers from your science class textbooks.

jargons.definition: A training method where an AI learns by trial and error, earning 'points' when it does something right.
jargons.example: Think of teaching a puppy to sit. When it sits, you give it a treat. The AI tries thousands of moves and gets a digital 'treat' when it succeeds.
jargons.use_case: Used to train AI programs to beat world champions at chess or navigate self-driving cars safely.

jargons.definition: Taking an AI that is already smart and giving it extra practice in one specific subject to make it an expert.
jargons.example: It is like a student who knows how to read and write taking special classes to learn how to become a master chef.
jargons.use_case: Turns a general conversational chat assistant into a super-focused math tutor.

tools.name: Cursor
tools.trending_factor: It helps kids and young creators write computer code easily by guessing what lines of code you need to write next.

tools.name: NotebookLM
tools.trending_factor: You can upload your class notes, and it instantly creates study guides, quizzes, and even a fun, podcast-style audio show!

tools.name: v0
tools.trending_factor: Creators love it because you can describe a website or app in simple English, and v0 builds the visual design for you in seconds.

tools.name: Midjourney
tools.trending_factor: It transforms wild text prompts into stunning, high-quality digital artwork, helping young artists bring their dream worlds to life.

tools.name: ElevenLabs
tools.trending_factor: Lets you design completely new, expressive voices or turn text into sound effects, which is perfect for building video game audio.
